appliedUpdates.description: Document the AppCommand 4-file pattern: new command variants require changes in messages/app.rs (variant), core/reducer/player.rs (routing), features/player/control.rs (dispatch), and features/player/playback.rs (implementation).
Document the seek timing model: when seeking, must set play_started_at=now-target, if paused set play_paused_at=now, reset play_paused_accum_ms=0.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the '允许修改的范围' to include src/features/player/control.rs and src/features/player/playback.rs for features that need new player commands. The current boundary is too restrictive — the pattern requires modifying these files to handle new AppCommand variants like PlayerSeekAbsoluteMs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature mouse-progress-seek needed to modify src/features/player/control.rs and src/features/player/playback.rs to implement PlayerSeekAbsoluteMs. AGENTS.md doesn't list these in allowed scope. All 3 mouse features used the 4-file command pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Recommend making layout constants (HEADER_HEIGHT, FOOTER_HEIGHT, TOAST_HEIGHT, LEFT_WIDTH, CENTER_WIDTH) in src/ui/tui/layout.rs public (pub const) so other modules can reference them instead of duplicating. This would prevent drift between layout.rs and mouse.rs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature mouse-list-click had to duplicate layout constants in mouse.rs because they're private in layout.rs. Future mouse or layout-dependent features would face the same issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: DoubleClickDetector uses thread_local! + RefCell which could be problematic in multi-threaded scenarios.
rejectedObservations.reason: TUI event loop is single-threaded by design. The observation is speculative about a scenario that doesn't apply.
This is a reasonable forward-looking design choice. Not an issue requiring action.
